mnemonics: CHANG S: Consider Humans, Always Navigate Guidelines, Safely
keyPoints: The 'Chang S' framework emphasizes prioritizing human well-being and ethical considerations in AI development.
It provides a structured approach for navigating the complex ethical landscape of AI.
The framework serves as a practical checklist to ensure AI systems are developed and deployed responsibly.
commonMistakes: Treating 'Chang S' as a one-time checklist rather than an iterative, ongoing process.
Focusing solely on the technical aspects of the AI and neglecting the human and societal impacts.
Assuming the framework guarantees ethical outcomes without the need for critical interpretation and context-specific application.
